verdict.headline: Safe to transact — this is a labeled Coinbase exchange hot wallet with a clean sanctions screen.
verdict.reasoning: The Chainalysis on-chain oracle and the x402 sanctions service both return clean (no SDN/sanctions match). The eth-labels registry attributes this address to "Coinbase 1" with labels "coinbase" and "fiat-gateway" — a major, well-known centralized exchange hot wallet, which is strong positive attribution. On-chain history shows a healthy ~11.08 ETH balance consistent with an active exchange wallet, and no negative web sentiment or contract risk applies (EOA). With multiple independent positive signals and no negatives, confidence is high.

findings.finding: Chainalysis on-chain oracle reports isSanctioned=false; x402 sanctions service also returns no matches (risk_level: low).
eth-labels registry identifies this address as 'Coinbase 1' with labels 'coinbase' and 'fiat-gateway' — a major CEX hot wallet.
Active wallet holding ~11.078 ETH, consistent with an exchange operational wallet.
No ENS reverse record (neutral; CEX hot wallets typically do not set ENS).
No adverse web sentiment hits returned.

Resource 1 is the only labels candidate with a confirmed 0% failure rate, which is the strongest signal; the soft entity-attribution preference for cluster-score candidates does not override this real-world performance advantage.
Resource 1 is the only onchain_history candidate with a confirmed 0% failure rate combined with inputInfoCompleteness of 2/3, making it clearly the best choice.
